item.title: Send Emails from Flow without a Service Account
item.description: Learn how to send emails from Power Automate without a service account! 🚀 This step-by-step guide walks you through setting up an App Registration, securing permissions in Exchange Online, and using a custom connector—no password resets or login issues. Perfect for secure, scalable email automation in Microsoft 365! 🔗 #PowerAutomate #Microsoft365 #Automation

item.title: Calculate Working Day
item.description: Calculating working days in Power Automate can be challenging due to the various factors like weekends, holidays, and custom schedules. To help simplify this process, I’ve developed a tool designed to handle multiple working day scenarios with ease. This post walks you through the setup and usage of the tool, complete with step-by-step instructions.
